name: Beet Cucumber Salad Ring
recipeInstructions:
1. Drain the beets and reserve the liquid.
2. In a small saucepan, combine the gelatin, sugar, and salt. Add enough water to make 1 3/4 cups of liquid.
3. Stir in the lemon juice until the gelatin dissolves.
4. Pour about 3/4 cup of the gelatin mixture into a 3 1/2- or 4-cup ring mold.
5. Arrange cucumber slices at the bottom of the mold.
6. Chill both gelatin mixtures until partially set.
7. Stir the drained beets into the larger amount of gelatin.
8. Spoon over the cucumbers in the mold.
9. Chill until firm.
10. Unmold onto a lettuce-lined serving plate.
